Business: Morarjee Textiles Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of yarns and fabrics in India and internationally. It also offers cotton shirting fabrics; printed fabrics, including satin, cambric, poplin, lawn, and silk; yarn dyed shirting, such as prima linea, ganges, and seasonal collection; and voiles and white fabrics.   Current: 3.63 %  (+0.28% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.50  (-3.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
